tests.name: Branches obrigatórias (8 branches existem)
tests.run: FALTANDO=0; for b in fix/imagens-cores fix/rodape fix/sobre-nos-texto feature/secao-equipe fix/menu-projetos feature/secao-contato feature/redes-sociais docs/readme; do if git branch -r | grep -q "origin/$b"; then echo "✅ $b"; else echo "❌ Faltando: $b"; FALTANDO=$((FALTANDO+1)); fi; done; test $FALTANDO -eq 0

tests.name: Padrão de nomes das branches (feature/fix/hotfix/docs)
tests.run: INVALIDAS=0; TOTAL=0; for b in $(git branch -r | grep -v HEAD | grep -v main | sed 's| *origin/||'); do TOTAL=$((TOTAL+1)); case "$b" in feature/*|fix/*|hotfix/*|docs/*|style/*|refactor/*) echo "✅ $b" ;; *) echo "❌ Fora do padrão: $b"; INVALIDAS=$((INVALIDAS+1)) ;; esac; done; echo "Branches encontradas: $TOTAL"; test $TOTAL -ge 1 && test $INVALIDAS -eq 0

tests.name: Conventional Commits (≥80% dos commits)
tests.run: TOTAL=0; CORRETOS=0; git log --oneline --no-merges --all | while IFS= read -r line; do MSG=$(echo "$line" | cut -d' ' -f2-); case "$MSG" in Merge*) continue ;; esac; TOTAL=$((TOTAL+1)); case "$MSG" in feat:*|feat\(*|fix:*|fix\(*|docs:*|docs\(*|style:*|style\(*|refactor:*|refactor\(*|test:*|test\(*|chore:*|chore\(*|perf:*|perf\(*|ci:*|ci\(*|build:*|build\(*|revert:*|revert\(*) CORRETOS=$((CORRETOS+1)) ;; *) echo "❌ $line" ;; esac; echo "$CORRETOS $TOTAL" > /tmp/cc_result; done; read CORRETOS TOTAL < /tmp/cc_result; echo "$CORRETOS/$TOTAL commits no padrão"; test "$TOTAL" -gt 0 && PERC=$((CORRETOS*100/TOTAL)) && echo "Conformidade: ${PERC}%" && test $PERC -ge 80

tests.name: Mínimo de 2 commits por branch
tests.run: INSUF=0; ENCONTRADAS=0; for b in fix/imagens-cores fix/rodape fix/sobre-nos-texto feature/secao-equipe fix/menu-projetos feature/secao-contato feature/redes-sociais docs/readme; do if git branch -r | grep -q "origin/$b"; then ENCONTRADAS=$((ENCONTRADAS+1)); COUNT=$(git log --oneline origin/main..origin/$b --no-merges 2>/dev/null | wc -l); if test "$COUNT" -lt 2; then echo "❌ $b: $COUNT commit(s)"; INSUF=$((INSUF+1)); else echo "✅ $b: $COUNT commits"; fi; fi; done; echo "Branches encontradas: $ENCONTRADAS/8"; test $ENCONTRADAS -ge 1 && test $INSUF -eq 0

tests.name: Pull Requests (≥8 mergeados via merge commits)
tests.run: MERGED=$(git log --oneline --merges --first-parent main | wc -l); echo "Merge commits na main: $MERGED"; test "$MERGED" -ge 8

tests.name: Issues (≥5 referenciadas nos commits)
tests.run: REFS=$(git log --all --oneline | grep -oE '#[0-9]+' | sort -u | wc -l); echo "Issues referenciadas: $REFS"; test "$REFS" -ge 5

tests.name: GitHub Pages + README completo
tests.run: CHECKS=0; if test -f index.html; then echo '✅ index.html existe'; CHECKS=$((CHECKS+1)); else echo '❌ index.html não encontrado'; fi; if test -f README.md; then echo '✅ README.md existe'; if grep -qi 'socialconnect' README.md || grep -qi 'social connect' README.md || grep -qi 'rede social' README.md; then echo '  ✅ Resumo do projeto'; CHECKS=$((CHECKS+1)); else echo '  ❌ Falta resumo do projeto'; fi; if grep -qi 'html' README.md || grep -qi 'css' README.md || grep -qi 'javascript' README.md || grep -qi 'tecnolog' README.md; then echo '  ✅ Tecnologias'; CHECKS=$((CHECKS+1)); else echo '  ❌ Falta tecnologias'; fi; if grep -qi 'integrante' README.md || grep -qi 'membro' README.md || grep -qi 'equipe' README.md || grep -qi 'RM' README.md; then echo '  ✅ Integrantes'; CHECKS=$((CHECKS+1)); else echo '  ❌ Falta integrantes'; fi; if grep -qi 'github.io' README.md || grep -qi 'pages' README.md; then echo '  ✅ Link do Pages'; CHECKS=$((CHECKS+1)); else echo '  ❌ Falta link do Pages'; fi; else echo '❌ README.md não encontrado'; fi; echo "Checks: $CHECKS/5"; test $CHECKS -ge 4

tests.name: 📊 Resumo da avaliação
tests.run: echo '=========================================='; echo '  RESUMO DA AVALIAÇÃO - CP2 Git e Github'; echo '=========================================='; echo ''; echo '  #  Critério                          Pts   Resultado'; echo '  -  --------------------------------  ----  ---------'; NOTA=0; R1='❌'; FALTANDO=0; for b in fix/imagens-cores fix/rodape fix/sobre-nos-texto feature/secao-equipe fix/menu-projetos feature/secao-contato feature/redes-sociais docs/readme; do if ! git branch -r | grep -q "origin/$b"; then FALTANDO=$((FALTANDO+1)); fi; done; if test $FALTANDO -eq 0; then R1='✅'; NOTA=$(echo "$NOTA + 1.5" | bc); fi; echo "  1  Branches obrigatórias              1.5   $R1"; R2='❌'; INVALIDAS=0; TOTALB=0; for b in $(git branch -r | grep -v HEAD | grep -v main | sed 's| *origin/||'); do TOTALB=$((TOTALB+1)); case "$b" in feature/*|fix/*|hotfix/*|docs/*|style/*|refactor/*) ;; *) INVALIDAS=$((INVALIDAS+1)) ;; esac; done; if test $TOTALB -ge 1 && test $INVALIDAS -eq 0; then R2='✅'; NOTA=$(echo "$NOTA + 1.0" | bc); fi; echo "  2  Padrão de nomes                    1.0   $R2"; R3='❌'; TOTAL=0; CORRETOS=0; git log --oneline --no-merges --all | while IFS= read -r line; do MSG=$(echo "$line" | cut -d' ' -f2-); case "$MSG" in Merge*) continue ;; esac; TOTAL=$((TOTAL+1)); case "$MSG" in feat:*|feat\(*|fix:*|fix\(*|docs:*|docs\(*|style:*|style\(*|refactor:*|refactor\(*|test:*|test\(*|chore:*|chore\(*|perf:*|perf\(*|ci:*|ci\(*|build:*|build\(*|revert:*|revert\(*) CORRETOS=$((CORRETOS+1)) ;; esac; echo "$CORRETOS $TOTAL" > /tmp/cc_sum; done; if test -f /tmp/cc_sum; then read C T < /tmp/cc_sum; if test "$T" -gt 0; then P=$((C*100/T)); if test $P -ge 80; then R3='✅'; NOTA=$(echo "$NOTA + 1.5" | bc); fi; fi; fi; echo "  3  Conventional Commits               1.5   $R3"; R4='❌'; INSUF=0; ENC=0; for b in fix/imagens-cores fix/rodape fix/sobre-nos-texto feature/secao-equipe fix/menu-projetos feature/secao-contato feature/redes-sociais docs/readme; do if git branch -r | grep -q "origin/$b"; then ENC=$((ENC+1)); CNT=$(git log --oneline origin/main..origin/$b --no-merges 2>/dev/null | wc -l); if test "$CNT" -lt 2; then INSUF=$((INSUF+1)); fi; fi; done; if test $ENC -ge 1 && test $INSUF -eq 0; then R4='✅'; NOTA=$(echo "$NOTA + 1.0" | bc); fi; echo "  4  Mín. 2 commits por branch          1.0   $R4"; R5='❌'; MRG=$(git log --oneline --merges --first-parent main | wc -l); if test "$MRG" -ge 8; then R5='✅'; NOTA=$(echo "$NOTA + 2.0" | bc); fi; echo "  5  Pull Requests mergeados (≥8)       2.0   $R5"; R6='❌'; ISS=$(git log --all --oneline | grep -oE '#[0-9]+' | sort -u | wc -l); if test "$ISS" -ge 5; then R6='✅'; NOTA=$(echo "$NOTA + 1.0" | bc); fi; echo "  6  Issues referenciadas (≥5)          1.0   $R6"; R7='❌'; CTB=$(git shortlog -sn --all --no-merges | wc -l); if test "$CTB" -ge 3; then R7='✅'; NOTA=$(echo "$NOTA + 1.0" | bc); fi; echo "  7  Contribuição (≥3 membros)          1.0   $R7"; R8='❌'; CK=0; if test -f index.html; then CK=$((CK+1)); fi; if test -f README.md; then if grep -qi 'socialconnect' README.md || grep -qi 'social connect' README.md || grep -qi 'rede social' README.md; then CK=$((CK+1)); fi; if grep -qi 'html' README.md || grep -qi 'css' README.md || grep -qi 'javascript' README.md || grep -qi 'tecnolog' README.md; then CK=$((CK+1)); fi; if grep -qi 'integrante' README.md || grep -qi 'membro' README.md || grep -qi 'equipe' README.md || grep -qi 'RM' README.md; then CK=$((CK+1)); fi; if grep -qi 'github.io' README.md || grep -qi 'pages' README.md; then CK=$((CK+1)); fi; fi; if test $CK -ge 4; then R8='✅'; NOTA=$(echo "$NOTA + 1.0" | bc); fi; echo "  8  GitHub Pages + README               1.0   $R8"; echo '  -  --------------------------------  ----  ---------'; echo "     NOTA FINAL                        10.0  $NOTA"; echo ''; echo '=========================================='
